creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text:
Snes9x-GTK auto-detects the presence of ALSA and fails to build if audio/alsa-lib is installed.


===>  Building for snes9x-gtk-1.52r79_2

Fix: Explicitly disable ALSA. Patch attached.
